bdo.srv.exec

Class MsnListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.sf.jml.event.MsnAdapter
      • bdo.srv.exec.MsnListener
  • All Implemented Interfaces:

    public class MsnListener
extends net.sf.jml.event.MsnAdapter
